channel.title: Josh Strife Hayes
channel.description:
MMORPG focused entertainment and review channel.
Second channel focused on nostalgia - https://www.youtube.com/c/joshstrifeplays
channel.itunes:author: Josh Strife Hayes
channel.itunes:subtitle: Josh Strife Hayes
channel.itunes:summary:
MMORPG focused entertainment and review channel.
Second channel focused on nostalgia - https://www.youtube.com/c/joshstrifeplays

item.title: Are MMOs DYING!?...or are we just expecting too much?
item.description:
Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/joshstrifehayes Twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/joshstrifehayes Discord: https://discord.gg/GM2sCUX Twitter: https://www.twitter.com/joshstrifehayes Reddit: https://www.reddit.com/r/joshstrifehayes
#####
Mum say's it's MY turn to make this video.
No, they are not, however player expectations of what a new MMO game needs to provide is unrealistic and often results in the 'non-instant success' being written off as a failure.
So play whatever game you like and buy some Gamer Supps: https://gamersupps.gg/josh
Thanks to the supporters on Patreon and Twitch as usual, you guys rock.
item.itunes:author: Josh Strife Hayes

#####
Mum say's it's MY turn to make this video.
No, they are not, however player expectations of what a new MMO game needs to provide is unrealistic and often results in the 'non-instant success' being written off as a failure.
So play whatever game you like and buy some Gamer Supps: https://gamersupps.gg/josh
Thanks to the supporters on Patreon and Twitch as usual, you guys rock.
